mirror_phase_logic.action: Copy Left to Right, Invert Phase of Right, Delay Right by 1.618ms
mirror_phase_logic.result: Maximum Stereo-width with total mono-cancellation of the 'Ghost-Layer'
mirror_phase_logic.usage: For Layer 3 Background-Void to create 'Sound from Nowhere'
mirror_phase_logic.safety_check: Primary Narrative elements (Layer 1 & 2) must bypass this to remain mono-compatible.
